    private void jButton20ActionPerformed(java.awt.event.ActionEvent evt) {                                          
b=Integer.parseInt(t1.getText());
if(c==1)
   d=a+b;
else if(c==2)
    d=a-b;
else if(c==3)
    d=a*b;
  else if (c==4)
      d=a/b;
  else if (c==5)
      d=a/b*100;
  else if (c==6)
     
 d=0;
t1.setText(""+d);





// TODO add your handling code here:
    }
